title: Kintu: The First Man of Buganda
description: The foundation myth of the Buganda kingdom: Kintu descends from heaven with one cow and must pass tests to win Nambi, daughter of the sky god.
introduction: The foundation myth of the Buganda kingdom: Kintu descends from heaven with one cow and must pass tests to win Nambi, daughter of the sky god.

translation.text: Kintu came from heaven with his cow. Ggulu the sky god tested him three times before giving his daughter.
